# EID03

<html lang="ar" dir="rtl">
<head>
<meta charset="UTF-8">
<meta name="viewport" content="width=device-width, initial-scale=1.0">
<title>بطاقة عيد مبارك</title>
<style>
  @import url('https://fonts.googleapis.com/css2?family=Tajawal:wght@400;700;900&display=swap');
  * { margin:0; padding:0; box-sizing:border-box; }

  body {
    background: linear-gradient(135deg, #2a1f0e 0%, #3d2e1a 100%);
    min-height: 100vh;
    display: flex;
    flex-direction: column;
    align-items: center;
    justify-content: center;
    font-family: 'Tajawal', sans-serif;
    padding: 20px;
  }

  h1 {
    color: #d4b483;
    font-size: 1.5rem;
    margin-bottom: 18px;
    text-align: center;
    text-shadow: 0 0 20px rgba(212,180,131,0.35);
  }

  /* ── Thumbnails ── */
  .thumb-row {
    display: flex;
    gap: 14px;
    margin-bottom: 20px;
    justify-content: center;
  }
  .thumb-card {
    position: relative;
    width: 90px;
    height: 145px;
    border-radius: 10px;
    overflow: hidden;
    cursor: pointer;
    border: 3px solid transparent;
    transition: all 0.3s;
    box-shadow: 0 4px 15px rgba(0,0,0,0.45);
    flex-shrink: 0;
  }
  .thumb-card:hover { transform: translateY(-4px); box-shadow: 0 8px 22px rgba(0,0,0,0.5); }
  .thumb-card.active {
    border-color: #c9a84c;
    box-shadow: 0 0 0 2px #c9a84c, 0 8px 22px rgba(201,168,76,0.4);
    transform: translateY(-4px);
  }
  .thumb-card img { width:100%; height:100%; object-fit:cover; display:block; }
  .thumb-label {
    position: absolute;
    bottom: 0; left: 0; right: 0;
    background: rgba(0,0,0,0.55);
    color: #fff;
    font-family: 'Tajawal', sans-serif;
    font-size: 0.7rem; font-weight: 700;
    text-align: center; padding: 5px 3px;
    backdrop-filter: blur(4px);
  }
  .thumb-card.active .thumb-label {
    background: rgba(201,168,76,0.8);
    color: #1a1000;
  }

  /* ── Main Card ── */
  .card-wrapper { width:100%; max-width:440px; }
  canvas {
    width: 100%;
    border-radius: 14px;
    box-shadow: 0 20px 60px rgba(0,0,0,0.55);
    display: block;
  }

  /* ── Controls ── */
  .controls {
    margin-top: 20px;
    width: 100%; max-width: 440px;
    display: flex; flex-direction: column; gap: 13px;
  }
  .input-group { display:flex; gap:10px; align-items:center; }
  input[type="text"] {
    flex: 1; padding: 13px 16px;
    border-radius: 12px;
    border: 2px solid rgba(212,180,131,0.35);
    background: rgba(255,255,255,0.07);
    color: white; font-family:'Tajawal',sans-serif;
    font-size: 1.05rem; outline: none;
    transition: border-color 0.3s;
    text-align: right; direction: rtl;
  }
  input[type="text"]::placeholder { color: rgba(255,255,255,0.35); }
  input[type="text"]:focus {
    border-color: #d4b483;
    background: rgba(255,255,255,0.11);
  }
  button {
    padding: 13px 20px; border-radius: 12px;
    border: none; cursor: pointer;
    font-family: 'Tajawal',sans-serif;
    font-size: 1rem; font-weight: 700; transition: all 0.3s;
  }
  .btn-apply {
    background: linear-gradient(135deg, #7a5c2a, #b08840);
    color: white; flex-shrink: 0;
  }
  .btn-apply:hover { transform:translateY(-2px); box-shadow:0 6px 18px rgba(122,92,42,0.5); }

  .color-group { display:flex; align-items:center; gap:12px; }
  .color-group label {
    color: rgba(255,255,255,0.8);
    font-family:'Tajawal',sans-serif; font-size:0.95rem; flex:1;
  }
  input[type="color"] {
    width:48px; height:38px; border-radius:8px;
    border:2px solid rgba(212,180,131,0.4);
    background:none; cursor:pointer; padding:2px;
  }

  .btn-download {
    width:100%;
    background: linear-gradient(135deg, #5a3e18, #8a6030);
    color:white; font-size:1.05rem; padding:15px;
  }
  .btn-download:hover { transform:translateY(-2px); box-shadow:0 8px 22px rgba(90,62,24,0.55); }
  .btn-download:disabled { opacity:0.5; cursor:not-allowed; transform:none; }
  .hint { color:rgba(255,255,255,0.38); font-size:0.82rem; text-align:center; }

  .photo-group { display:none; flex-direction:column; gap:10px; }
  .photo-row   { display:flex; gap:10px; align-items:center; }
  .photo-label {
    flex:1; padding:12px 16px; border-radius:12px;
    border:2px dashed rgba(212,180,131,0.5);
    background:rgba(255,255,255,0.05);
    color:rgba(255,255,255,0.8);
    font-family:'Tajawal',sans-serif; font-size:0.95rem; font-weight:700;
    cursor:pointer; text-align:center; transition:all 0.3s;
  }
  .photo-label:hover { border-color:#d4b483; color:#d4b483; }
  .btn-remove-photo {
    padding:12px 14px; border-radius:12px;
    border:2px solid rgba(220,80,80,0.45);
    background:rgba(220,80,80,0.1); color:rgba(255,120,120,0.9);
    font-family:'Tajawal',sans-serif; font-size:0.9rem; font-weight:700;
    cursor:pointer; transition:all 0.3s; display:none; flex-shrink:0;
  }
  .photo-adjust {
    display:none; flex-direction:column; align-items:center; gap:10px;
    background:rgba(255,255,255,0.05);
    border:1.5px solid rgba(212,180,131,0.3);
    border-radius:14px; padding:14px 18px;
  }
  .adjust-label { color:rgba(255,255,255,0.7); font-size:0.88rem; font-family:'Tajawal',sans-serif; font-weight:700; }
  .adjust-arrows { display:flex; flex-direction:column; align-items:center; gap:5px; }
  .adj-row { display:flex; gap:5px; align-items:center; }
  .adj-btn {
    width:42px; height:42px; border-radius:10px;
    border:1.5px solid rgba(212,180,131,0.4);
    background:rgba(255,255,255,0.07); color:#d4b483;
    font-size:1rem; cursor:pointer; transition:all 0.2s;
    display:flex; align-items:center; justify-content:center; padding:0;
  }
  .adj-btn:hover { background:rgba(212,180,131,0.18); transform:scale(1.1); }
  .adj-btn:active { transform:scale(0.95); }
  .adj-reset { color:rgba(255,255,255,0.65); }
  .zoom-row { display:flex; align-items:center; gap:12px; }
  .zoom-val { color:#d4b483; font-family:'Tajawal',sans-serif; font-size:0.9rem; font-weight:700; min-width:46px; text-align:center; }
</style>
</head>
<body>

<h1>✨ بطاقة عيد مبارك ✨</h1>

<!-- Thumbnails -->
<div class="thumb-row">
  <div class="thumb-card active" id="thumb0" onclick="switchDesign(0)">
    <img src="data:image/jpeg;base64," alt="تصميم ١"/>
    <span class="thumb-label">تصميم ١</span>
  </div>
  <div class="thumb-card" id="thumb1" onclick="switchDesign(1)">
    <img src="data:image/jpeg;base64," alt="تصميم ٢"/>
    <span class="thumb-label">تصميم ٢</span>
  </div>
</div>

<!-- Main Canvas -->
<div class="card-wrapper">
  <canvas id="canvas"></canvas>
</div>

<!-- Controls -->
<div class="controls">
  <div class="input-group">
    <input type="text" id="nameInput" placeholder="اكتب اسمك هنا..." maxlength="40"/>
    <button class="btn-apply" onclick="drawCard()">تطبيق</button>
  </div>
  <div class="color-group">
    <label>لون الخط:</label>
    <input type="color" id="textColor" value="#ffffff" oninput="drawCard()"/>
  </div>
  <div class="photo-group" id="photoGroup">
    <div class="photo-row">
      <label class="photo-label" for="photoInput">
        <span id="photoLabelText">📷 أضف صورتك الشخصية</span>
      </label>
      <input type="file" id="photoInput" accept="image/*" onchange="handlePhoto(event)" style="display:none"/>
      <button class="btn-remove-photo" id="removePhotoBtn" onclick="removePhoto()">✕ إزالة</button>
    </div>
    <div class="photo-adjust" id="photoAdjust">
      <span class="adjust-label">تحريك الصورة داخل الدائرة</span>
      <div class="adjust-arrows">
        <button class="adj-btn" onclick="movePhoto(0,-18)">▲</button>
        <div class="adj-row">
          <button class="adj-btn" onclick="movePhoto(-18,0)">◀</button>
          <button class="adj-btn adj-reset" onclick="resetPhoto()">↺</button>
          <button class="adj-btn" onclick="movePhoto(18,0)">▶</button>
        </div>
        <button class="adj-btn" onclick="movePhoto(0,18)">▼</button>
      </div>
      <div class="zoom-row">
        <button class="adj-btn" onclick="zoomPhoto(-0.1)">－</button>
        <span class="zoom-val" id="zoomVal">100%</span>
        <button class="adj-btn" onclick="zoomPhoto(0.1)">＋</button>
      </div>
    </div>
  </div>
  <button class="btn-download" id="dlBtn" onclick="downloadCard()" disabled>⬇️ تحميل البطاقة</button>
  <p class="hint">اكتب اسمك واضغط تطبيق ثم حمّل البطاقة</p>
</div>

<script>
const canvas = document.getElementById('canvas');
const ctx    = canvas.getContext('2d');
let currentDesign = 0;
let userPhoto    = null;
let photoOffsetX = 0;
let photoOffsetY = 0;
let photoScale   = 1.0;

// Design 1: dark green rounded bar ~72% height, white text
// Design 2: light grey rounded bar ~61% height, dark text
const designs = [
  { textY: 0.695, fontSize: 0.055, defaultColor: '#ffffff', hasPhoto: true  },
  { textY: 0.635, fontSize: 0.052, defaultColor: '#3a3a3a', hasPhoto: false },
];

const imgs = [new Image(), new Image()];
let loaded = 0;
function onLoad() {
  loaded++;
  if (loaded === 2) {
    canvas.width  = imgs[0].width;
    canvas.height = imgs[0].height;
    if (document.fonts && document.fonts.ready)
      document.fonts.ready.then(drawCard);
    else drawCard();
  }
}
imgs[0].onload = imgs[1].onload = onLoad;
imgs[0].src = 'data:image/jpeg;base64,';
imgs[1].src = 'data:image/jpeg;base64,';

function switchDesign(idx) {
  currentDesign = idx;
  document.querySelectorAll('.thumb-card').forEach((t,i) => t.classList.toggle('active', i===idx));
  document.getElementById('textColor').value = designs[idx].defaultColor;
  document.getElementById('photoGroup').style.display = designs[idx].hasPhoto ? 'flex' : 'none';
  canvas.width  = imgs[idx].width;
  canvas.height = imgs[idx].height;
  drawCard();
}

function drawCard() {
  const img = imgs[currentDesign];
  if (!img || !img.width) return;
  canvas.width  = img.width;
  canvas.height = img.height;
  ctx.drawImage(img, 0, 0);

  // Design 1: draw photo circle between calligraphy and text area
  if (currentDesign === 0) {
    if (userPhoto) drawPhotoCircle(ctx, canvas.width, canvas.height, userPhoto);
    else           drawPhotoPlaceholder(ctx, canvas.width, canvas.height);
  }

  const name = document.getElementById('nameInput').value.trim();
  if (!name) { document.getElementById('dlBtn').disabled = false; return; }

  const d    = designs[currentDesign];
  const fs   = Math.round(canvas.width * d.fontSize);
  const font = `bold ${fs}px 'Tajawal', Arial`;
  const go   = () => applyName(name, canvas.width, canvas.height, d, font);
  if (document.fonts && document.fonts.load)
    document.fonts.load(font, name).then(go).catch(go);
  else go();
  document.getElementById('dlBtn').disabled = false;
}

function applyName(name, w, h, d, font) {
  ctx.save();
  ctx.shadowColor  = 'rgba(0,0,0,0.4)';
  ctx.shadowBlur   = 10;
  ctx.fillStyle    = document.getElementById('textColor').value;
  ctx.font         = font;
  ctx.textAlign    = 'center';
  ctx.textBaseline = 'middle';
  ctx.direction    = 'rtl';
  ctx.fillText(name, w/2, h * d.textY);
  ctx.restore();
  document.getElementById('dlBtn').disabled = false;
}

// ── Photo circle: placed at ~46% height, good spot between calligraphy & text ──
function circleParams(w, h) {
  return { r: w * 0.13, cx: w * 0.85, cy: h * 0.38 };
}

function drawPhotoCircle(ctx, w, h, photo) {
  const {r, cx, cy} = circleParams(w, h);
  // Outer gold glow ring
  ctx.save();
  ctx.shadowColor = 'rgba(180,140,60,0.7)';
  ctx.shadowBlur  = 22;
  ctx.beginPath();
  ctx.arc(cx, cy, r+6, 0, Math.PI*2);
  const rg = ctx.createLinearGradient(cx-r, cy-r, cx+r, cy+r);
  rg.addColorStop(0, '#b8860b');
  rg.addColorStop(0.5, '#f5e09a');
  rg.addColorStop(1, '#b8860b');
  ctx.strokeStyle = rg;
  ctx.lineWidth = 5;
  ctx.stroke();
  ctx.restore();
  // White inner ring
  ctx.beginPath();
  ctx.arc(cx, cy, r+1, 0, Math.PI*2);
  ctx.strokeStyle = 'rgba(255,255,255,0.7)';
  ctx.lineWidth = 2;
  ctx.stroke();
  // Clip & draw photo
  ctx.save();
  ctx.beginPath();
  ctx.arc(cx, cy, r, 0, Math.PI*2);
  ctx.clip();
  const base = Math.max((r*2)/photo.width, (r*2)/photo.height) * photoScale;
  const dw = photo.width  * base;
  const dh = photo.height * base;
  ctx.drawImage(photo, cx - dw/2 + photoOffsetX, cy - dh/2 + photoOffsetY, dw, dh);
  ctx.restore();
}

function drawPhotoPlaceholder(ctx, w, h) {
  const {r, cx, cy} = circleParams(w, h);
  ctx.save();
  ctx.setLineDash([10, 6]);
  ctx.beginPath();
  ctx.arc(cx, cy, r+5, 0, Math.PI*2);
  ctx.strokeStyle = 'rgba(180,140,60,0.6)';
  ctx.lineWidth = 3;
  ctx.stroke();
  ctx.setLineDash([]);
  ctx.fillStyle = 'rgba(120,90,30,0.7)';
  ctx.font = `bold ${r*0.6}px Arial`;
  ctx.textAlign = 'center';
  ctx.textBaseline = 'middle';
  ctx.fillText('📷', cx, cy - r*0.1);
  ctx.font = `bold ${r*0.28}px 'Tajawal', Arial`;
  ctx.fillText('أضف صورتك', cx, cy + r*0.5);
  ctx.restore();
}

function handlePhoto(e) {
  const file = e.target.files[0];
  if (!file) return;
  const reader = new FileReader();
  reader.onload = (ev) => {
    const image = new Image();
    image.onload = () => {
      userPhoto = image;
      photoOffsetX = 0; photoOffsetY = 0; photoScale = 1.0;
      document.getElementById('zoomVal').textContent = '100%';
      document.getElementById('photoLabelText').textContent = '✅ ' + file.name.substring(0,22);
      document.getElementById('removePhotoBtn').style.display = 'block';
      document.getElementById('photoAdjust').style.display = 'flex';
      drawCard();
    };
    image.src = ev.target.result;
  };
  reader.readAsDataURL(file);
}

function removePhoto() {
  userPhoto = null;
  photoOffsetX = 0; photoOffsetY = 0; photoScale = 1.0;
  document.getElementById('photoInput').value = '';
  document.getElementById('photoLabelText').textContent = '📷 أضف صورتك الشخصية';
  document.getElementById('removePhotoBtn').style.display = 'none';
  document.getElementById('photoAdjust').style.display = 'none';
  drawCard();
}

function movePhoto(dx, dy) {
  if (!userPhoto) return;
  photoOffsetX += dx; photoOffsetY += dy;
  drawCard();
}

function zoomPhoto(delta) {
  if (!userPhoto) return;
  photoScale = Math.max(0.4, Math.min(3.5, photoScale + delta));
  document.getElementById('zoomVal').textContent = Math.round(photoScale*100) + '%';
  drawCard();
}

function resetPhoto() {
  photoOffsetX = 0; photoOffsetY = 0; photoScale = 1.0;
  document.getElementById('zoomVal').textContent = '100%';
  drawCard();
}

function downloadCard() {
  const name = document.getElementById('nameInput').value.trim() || 'بطاقة-عيد';
  const link = document.createElement('a');
  link.download = `عيد-${name}.png`;
  link.href = canvas.toDataURL('image/png');
  link.click();
}

document.getElementById('nameInput').addEventListener('keydown', e => {
  if (e.key === 'Enter') drawCard();
});
</script>
</body>
</html>
